title: Render Distance Util
description: This mod allows you to change your render distance while playing by pressing a key on your keyboard or using the command '/set_render_distance'!
body:
This mod allows you to change your render distance while playing by pressing a key on your keyboard or using the command '/set_render_distance'!

require: [https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
